FROM claude-3.7-sonnet
IDENTITY haystack-agent-001
CAPABILITY reasoning
CAPABILITY code_understanding
CAPABILITY writing
CAPABILITY shell_execution
CAPABILITY file_operations
CAPABILITY coordination
CONSTRAINT max_tokens 100000
CONSTRAINT tool_access mcp_only
CONSTRAINT write_discipline generation_aware
CONSTRAINT output_compression signal_over_noise
TOOL shell
TOOL spawn
TOOL interact
TOOL lock
TOOL session
TOOL help
TOOL tack
TRUST T1
